summary: Classified the live hydrated cluster around Discord/Slack visible-progress feedback. #90866 remains the best canonical issue for the Discord speculative placeholder request; #90017 is related Slack parity, #84276 is a separate Discord message_tool_only stale-typing bug with excluded overlapping PRs, and #87665 is a separate Discord subagent visibility policy issue.
